pages.text:
EAC.209/021

REPUBLIC OF TANGANYIKA

Instrument of Accession

International Convention relating to International Exhibitions, 1928.

WHEREAS a Convention was drawn up at Paris on the 22nd of

November, 1928, and amended by a Protocol on the 10th of May, 1948, and mas siened by representatives of the Goverrments of certain Powers and States;

WHEREAS the Government of the Republic of Tanganyika, having seen and considered the said Convention and Protocol, deem it expedient to accede thereto;

NOW THEREFORE the undersigned JULIUS K. NYERERE, Fresident of the Republic of Tanganyika, hereby declares that the

Goverrment of the Republic of Tanganyika accede to the aforesaid Convention under Article 35 thereof, and the Protocol under Article 3 thereof and undertake faithfully to perforn and carry out all the stipulations and provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS whereof the undersigned, duly authorised, has signed and sealed this instrument.

Done in Der es Salaam on the ..28!

..... day of February,

1963.

Julie Klan

Julius K. Nyerere

President,
